text:
1. Note the time difference: US/Eastern is 5 hours ahead of UTC and US/Hawaii is 10 hours behind UTC, so the time difference between US/Eastern and US/Hawaii is 15 hours.
2. Add the time difference to the given time: 04:00 + 15:00 = 19:00.
3. Since the date doesn't change when adding 15 hours to 4 AM, the date remains February 4, 1512.
FINAL_ANSWER: 19:00
